name: @nuclescript/profiles
description: Illumina, Nanopore, and Twist hardware profile presets with recommended redundancy and measured error rates.

exports.name: illumina_standard
exports.description: Illumina archive defaults at the optimizer-recommended 4x redundancy for low coverage.

exports.name: illumina_high_coverage
exports.description: Illumina archive defaults at 3x redundancy, recommended once coverage reaches 10x or more.

exports.name: nanopore_standard
exports.description: Nanopore archive defaults at the optimizer-recommended 8x redundancy for low coverage.

exports.name: nanopore_high_coverage
exports.description: Nanopore archive defaults at 6x redundancy, recommended once coverage reaches 10x or more.

exports.name: twist_standard
exports.description: Twist synthesis defaults at 2x redundancy for its very low error rate.

exports.name: recommended_pool_for_illumina
exports.description: Simulates a target pool under Illumina and returns its measured 0.35% error-rate binding.

exports.name: recommended_pool_for_nanopore
exports.description: Simulates a target pool under Nanopore and returns its measured 5.00% error-rate binding.

exports.name: recommended_pool_for_twist
exports.description: Simulates a target pool under Twist and returns its measured 0.03% error-rate binding.
